name: Thomas Kurmann
title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer
bio: I am a Staff Machine Learning Engineer at Intuitive, where I lead the machine learning team working on surgical robotics. I am the DRI (Directly Responsible Individual) for stereo matching algorithms in the da Vinci robot.

I hold a PhD in Biomedical Engineering from the University of Bern, where I researched AI for medical imaging with a focus on ophthalmology and robotic minimally invasive surgery. I have published 6 first-author papers in top-tier venues.
